surfaces.rationale: Inspection: _collect_external_session_evidence serializes only the ACP run ID and the run-ID-keyed Redis plan's positive Decimal cost into a fixed content-free schema; it never includes prompt text, file contents, environment mappings, or credential fields, and the serialized value is then persisted only through _stream_sanitized.
surfaces.sanitizer: schema-limited content-free snapshot followed by optimus_security.sanitization.StreamingTextSanitizer

surfaces.rationale: Inspection: _compute_evidence_manifest_hmac serializes the complete evidence manifest minus hmac: sanitizer metadata, artifact digests, joined-scan result, timestamp, and the content-free session mode/tool names/count/cost/stop reason/bounded final state/child-key names/comparison-record boolean/run nonce. It never serializes prompt text, file contents, environment values, credential material, or the HMAC key.
surfaces.sanitizer: schema-limited functional path; manifest contains no secret material

surfaces.rationale: Inspection: _read_log_suffix opens only the controlled workspace's append-only launch-audit/debug source at a pre-capture byte offset for in-memory validation; it never writes or exports the raw suffix, and any promoted copy is produced separately through _stream_sanitized after run-scoped validation succeeds.
surfaces.sanitizer: read-only offset-bounded source; downstream persistence uses optimus_security.sanitization.StreamingTextSanitizer

surfaces.rationale: Inspection: tools.run_plan996_acpx_security_evidence:_reject_legacy_locator:stderr_export prints only the matched legacy locator pattern and the controlled capture command name with no credential or diagnostic content.
surfaces.sanitizer: schema-limited functional path; value-free pattern identifiers only

surfaces.rationale: Shared sanitizer protects runtime-controlled diagnostic content at tools.run_plan996_acpx_security_evidence:_stream_sanitized:file_open before this persistence or export boundary; sanitizer failure has no raw fallback. The file_open opens the transcript destination for writing; content is fed through StreamingTextSanitizer(known_secrets) before every write, and known_secrets is populated from the gated launch candidate (provider API key + shared secret + projected env secrets) so keyring-sourced credentials are covered.
surfaces.sanitizer: optimus_security.sanitization.StreamingTextSanitizer

surfaces.rationale: Shared sanitizer protects runtime-controlled diagnostic content at tools.run_plan996_acpx_security_evidence:_stream_sanitized:text_write before this persistence or export boundary; sanitizer failure has no raw fallback. Each stream.write call receives sanitizer.feed(chunk) or sanitizer.finalize() output, never raw child stdout/stderr; the sanitizer is constructed with known_secrets from the gated launch candidate so resolved keyring credentials are redacted.
surfaces.sanitizer: optimus_security.sanitization.StreamingTextSanitizer

surfaces.rationale: Inspection: tools.run_plan996_acpx_security_evidence:_verify_evidence_manifest:stderr_export prints only verification result codes (EVIDENCE_HMAC_MISMATCH, EVIDENCE_DIGEST_MISMATCH, EVIDENCE_PATTERN_HIT, EVIDENCE_SCAN_HIT, or success message) with no credential or diagnostic content.
surfaces.sanitizer: schema-limited functional path; value-free result codes only

surfaces.rationale: Inspection: _write_evidence_manifest serializes only sanitizer metadata, artifact digests, joined-scan result, timestamp/HMAC, and the validated content-free session fields (mode, tool identifiers/count, Decimal cost, stop reason, bounded final state, child-key names, comparison-record boolean, and run nonce). Raw prompts, file contents, environment values, and credentials are excluded by schema.
surfaces.sanitizer: schema-limited functional path; manifest contains no secret material

surfaces.rationale: Inspection: _write_evidence_manifest writes only the schema-limited JSON described above: sanitizer metadata, artifact digests, joined-scan result, timestamp/HMAC, and validated content-free session evidence. No raw prompt, file-content, environment-value, or credential field has a manifest path.
surfaces.sanitizer: schema-limited functional path; manifest contains no secret material

surfaces.rationale: Inspection: tools.run_plan996_acpx_security_evidence:main:stderr_export prints only controlled operational, status, or typed failure text to stderr (acpx-not-found, gate-rejection remediation, grant-failure codes, and provenance messages with no credential or diagnostic content) and does not retain it.
surfaces.sanitizer: schema-limited functional path or AST overmatch; no raw diagnostic retention

surfaces.rationale: Inspection: ledger_digest canonicalizes supplied ledger records only to calculate a SHA-256 evidence digest; it does not persist or export the record content.
surfaces.sanitizer: schema-limited functional path or AST overmatch; no raw diagnostic retention
